scripts.test:api: docker compose exec api npm test
scripts.test:web: docker compose exec web npm test
scripts.build:api: docker compose exec api npm run build
scripts.build:web: docker compose exec web npm run build
scripts.lint:api: docker compose exec api npm run lint
scripts.lint:web: docker compose exec web npm run lint
scripts.db:migrate: docker compose exec api npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:reset: docker compose exec api npx prisma migrate reset
scripts.db:studio: docker compose exec api npx prisma studio
scripts.db:generate: docker compose exec api npx prisma generate
